secondary.title: Artemis II宇航员传回首批月球飞掠照片
secondary.summary_zh: NASA发布Artemis II宇航员拍摄的首批月球飞掠照片，展示了人类从未见过的月球背面区域及罕见的太空日食景象。
secondary.brief_zh: Artemis II 宇航员传回首批月球飞掠照片

metadata.summary_en: The first flyby images of the Moon captured by NASA’s Artemis II astronauts during their historic test flight reveal some regions no human has seen, including a rare in-space solar eclipse. Released Tuesday, astronauts captured the images April 6 during the mission’s seven-hour flyby of the lunar far side, showing humanity’s return to the Moon’s […]
metadata.relevance_note: 重大航天成就，官方权威发布，配有高质量图片，是本板块的核心视觉素材。

briefs.title: Artemis II捕捉壮观“地落”景象
briefs.summary_zh: 宇航员飞越月球背面时拍下地球在月球地平线落下的壮观景象，极具视觉冲击力。
briefs.brief_zh: Artemis II 宇航员拍摄到壮观的“地落”景象及月球背面地貌。

metadata.summary_en: The Artemis II crew captured this view of Earth setting on April 6, 2026, as they flew around the Moon. As the astronauts flew over the Moon’s far side, the crew photographed and described terrain features including impact craters, ancient lava flows, and surface cracks and ridges formed as the Moon slowly evolved over time. […]
metadata.relevance_note: 极佳的视觉素材，满足板块对图片内容的质量要求，能显著提升新闻吸引力。

briefs.title: Artemis II机组返航途中休整
briefs.summary_zh: 阿尔忒弥斯二号机组完成绕月飞行返航途中迎来休息日，任务进展顺利。
briefs.brief_zh: 阿尔忒弥斯二号机组返航途中休整，任务顺利。

metadata.summary_en: The crew of the NASA mission had a quiet day as they flew home toward Earth.
metadata.relevance_note: 重大航天任务进展，虽无配图但新闻价值高，符合'其他'板块对热点科技新闻的收录标准。

briefs.title: 爱达荷州削减精神卫生服务致人死亡
briefs.summary_zh: 爱达荷州削减精神分裂症患者服务引发死亡事件，迫使当局紧急回撤政策。
briefs.brief_zh: 爱达荷州精神卫生削减政策致人死亡，政府紧急回调。

metadata.summary_en: Eliminating outreach to people with severe mental illness set off such a cascade of bad outcomes that Idaho has scrambled to reverse the cuts.
metadata.relevance_note: 深度社会健康类报道，虽无配图但议题重要，适合作为'其他'板块的深度阅读补充。

briefs.title: 新研究揭示迷幻药物影响大脑机制
briefs.summary_zh: 研究分析数百张大脑图像，揭示迷幻药物如何驱动大脑活动及潜在医疗用途。
briefs.brief_zh: 研究揭示迷幻药物对大脑的影响机制

metadata.summary_en: An analysis of hundreds of images from several studies shows how hallucinogenic drugs drive activity in various regions of the brain.
metadata.relevance_note: 前沿脑科学发现，公众关注度较高的健康科学话题，具备广泛读者吸引力。

briefs.title: 灵长类学家Biruté Galdikas逝世
briefs.summary_zh: 与珍·古道尔齐名的灵长类动物学家Biruté Galdikas辞世，毕生致力于红毛猩猩保护。
briefs.brief_zh: 著名灵长类学家 Biruté Galdikas 逝世

metadata.summary_en: With Jane Goodall and Dian Fossey, she was one of three prominent researchers of great apes who were sometimes called the “trimates.”
metadata.relevance_note: 科学界重要人物讣告，具有历史人文价值，适合作为板块内的深度人物素材。

briefs.title: Artemis II宇航员完成绕月飞行返航
briefs.summary_zh: 四名宇航员完成绕月飞行抵达距地球最远点，返程观测日食，总统特朗普通话致贺。
briefs.brief_zh: Artemis II 宇航员完成绕月飞行返航，抵达人类最远距离。

metadata.summary_en: The NASA lunar flyby took the four crew members farther from Earth than any humans. They witnessed a solar eclipse and received praise in a call from President Trump.
metadata.relevance_note: 重大科学突破与人类探索里程碑，符合“其他”板块对高关注度大事件的收录标准。

briefs.title: Artemis II宇航员命名陨石坑致敬指令长亡妻
briefs.summary_zh: 机组人员将月球陨石坑命名为指令长已故妻子之名，展现太空探索背后的人性光辉。
briefs.brief_zh: 宇航员将月球陨石坑命名为指令长已故妻子之名，展现人性光辉。

metadata.summary_en: The crew shared an emotional moment with mission control and the family of Reid Wiseman, whose wife, Carroll, died in 2020, on the ground in Houston.
metadata.relevance_note: 具有强情感共鸣的人文故事，丰富了硬核科技新闻的维度。
